description: Use this API to read an Optimal Power Flow Raw Data File. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ropf(rfile)

parameters.name: rfile
parameters.description: Optimal power flow data file name, or ‘1’ if is coming directly from the terminal or response file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
